page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A Python Package for Comprehensive Prediction of Lipid Collision Cross Sections and Retention Times and Analysis of Ion Mobility-Mass Spectrometry-Based Lipidomics Data.

lipydomics is a Python package for performing standard lipidomics analysis protocols on data in an efficient and reproducible fashion.
